name: Amphetamine
description: Amphetamine is a free keep-awake utility for macOS. It can keep your Mac and optionally its display(s) awake through a simple on/off switch, or automatically through easy-to-configure triggers.

changelog.note: Release notes are available in the App Store listing under 'What's New'. No separate changelog page.

notes: Free. Mac App Store only — no direct download, no Sparkle. UNCERTAINTY: iTunes API may eventually be deprecated in favor of the App Store Connect API, which requires authentication. The lookup endpoint still works but Apple has not committed to its long-term availability.
